ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genres associated with the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "mpa_rating" TEXT /* MPA rating of the film */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating of the film */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes on IMDb */,
  "imdb_gross" REAL /* Gross earnings on IMDb */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the film */,
  "crit_consensus" TEXT /* Critical consensus from reviews */,
  "tomato_meter" INTEGER /* Tomatometer score from Rotten Tomatoes */,
  "tomato_review" INTEGER /* Number of reviews on Rotten Tomatoes */,
  "tom_aud_score" INTEGER /* Audience score from Rotten Tomatoes */,
  "tom_ratings" INTEGER /* Total audience ratings from Rotten Tomatoes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the film */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) spoken in the film */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards received by the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the director was born */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards received by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the actor was born */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards received by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_actors" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Character name played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the film */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "opening_weekend" REAL /* Earnings from the opening weekend */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross earnings */,
  "opening_weekend_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening weekend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the studio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_studio_links" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the studio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film received the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "quote_text" TEXT /* Text of the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_quotes_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friends" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "friend_id")
)
column_names: Runtime of the film in minutes
Number of reviews on Rotten Tomatoes
Total audience ratings from Rotten Tomatoes
Character name played by the actor
ID of the film being reviewed
Unique identifier for each box office record
Source of the rating (e.g., IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes)
Unique identifier for each user account
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer)
Unique identifier for each user review
ID of the film being reviewed
ID of the user who wrote the review
Year the film received the award
